summary.TwistDuration: New LCM message: Twist + duration (float64). Full encode/decode/round-trip tested.
summary.CmdVelMux: New agent_cmd_vel: In[TwistDuration] port. Highest priority (agent > teleop > nav). Auto-stops after duration. No stop_movement signal.
summary.send_cmd_vel: Updated to publish TwistDuration on /agent_cmd_vel. Usage: send_cmd_vel <lx> <ly> <az> [duration=1.0]
summary.blueprint: No changes needed — agent_cmd_vel auto-exposes as LCM channel via autoconnect.
